name: Galaxy IT — Full Monthly Report (GSC + GA4 + GHL → Email + WhatsApp)

parameters.jsCode:
const client = $('Merge All Data').item.json; const report = $json.choices[0].message.content; const monthName = client.monthName; const reportHtml = report.replace(/\n/g, '
').replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/g, '$1').replace(/\*(.*?)\*/g, '$1'); const html = `

Galaxy IT & Marketing

Monthly Performance Report — ${monthName}

${client.impressions.toLocaleString()}
Impressions
${client.clicks.toLocaleString()}
Clicks
${client.totalLeads}
New Leads
$${client.pipelineValue.toLocaleString()}
Revenue

${reportHtml}

Questions? Visit Help Center or reply to this email.

© 2026 Galaxy IT & Marketing · Worcester, MA

`; let whatsapp = `📊 *Monthly Report — ${monthName}*\n\n`; whatsapp += `🔍 *Google:* ${client.impressions.toLocaleString()} impressions, ${client.clicks} clicks (${client.ctr}% CTR)\n`; whatsapp += `📈 *Traffic:* ${client.sessions} sessions, ${client.users} visitors\n`; whatsapp += `👥 *Leads:* ${client.totalLeads} new leads\n`; whatsapp += `💰 *Pipeline:* ${client.oppsWon} won ($${client.pipelineValue})\n\n`; whatsapp += `Full report sent to your email!`; return [{ json: { ...client, report, html, whatsapp, monthName } }];

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "type": "Email",
  "contactId": "{{ $json.contact.id }}",
  "subject": "Your Monthly Performance Report — {{ $('Format Email + WhatsApp').item.json.monthName }} | Galaxy IT",
  "html": {{ JSON.stringify($('Format Email + WhatsApp').item.json.html) }},
  "emailFrom": "Galaxy IT & Marketing <info@galaxyinfo.us>"
}
